disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known type 1 diabetic who skipped several insulin doses yesterday because of poor oral intake and feeling unwell
trigger_question_examples: Does she have any medical conditions?
Has she taken all her insulin as usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's type 1 diabetic. She missed some of her insulin yesterday because she felt too sick to eat and was worried it would drop her sugar.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Home glucose meter reads 'HI' (above measurable range) in this diabetic patient
trigger_question_examples: What does her blood-sugar meter say?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Her meter just says 'HI' — it won't even give a number, it's off the top of the scale.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Deep, rapid breathing with an unusual sweet smell on the breath
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed anything unusual about her breath?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's breathing really deep and fast, almost like she's puffing, and her breath smells oddly sweet, kind of like nail-polish remover.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: One day of heavy urination and extreme thirst — drank over 8 litres of water the previous day
trigger_question_examples: Has she been passing more urine than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's been weeing constantly and couldn't stop drinking — she went through more than 8 litres of water yesterday.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Increasingly drowsy and lethargic, struggling to stay upright
trigger_question_examples: How alert is she right now?
Can she stay awake and talk to you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's getting more and more sleepy — she can barely keep her eyes open and can't sit up on her own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Repeated vomiting and diffuse cramping abdominal pain over the last 8 hours
trigger_question_examples: How many times has she vomited?
Where exactly is the tummy pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's thrown up about four times and her whole tummy is cramping — it's all over, not one spot.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A mild upper-respiratory illness began two days before the deterioration
trigger_question_examples: Has she been unwell with anything else recently, like a cold?
Was she sick in any other way in the days before this started?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She had a bit of a head-cold starting a couple of days ago, nothing major at the time.
